title: AI Insights
subtitle: Personalized financial guidance for this canvas.

landing.generalAdviceDescription: These tips apply to most households. Complete the profile wizard below for advice tailored to this canvas.
landing.warningTitle: Complete your profile for better advice
landing.warningDescription: The tips below are general. Personalized AI insights will be much more accurate once you finish the 5-step profile wizard.

tips.emergencyFund: Aim to keep 3–6 months of essential expenses in an easily accessible emergency fund.
tips.debtFirst: Pay down high-interest debt before increasing discretionary investing.
tips.diversify: Spread investments across asset classes to reduce company-specific risk.
tips.reviewBudget: Review your budget monthly and adjust category limits when income or goals change.

wizard.title: Financial profile wizard
wizard.subtitle: Help us understand your goals and situation. You can save and continue later.

riskProfile.title: How much risk are you willing to take?
riskProfile.description: Your answers help us align suggestions with your comfort level.
riskProfile.acceptShortTermLoss: I accept short-term losses for potential long-term gains
riskProfile.portfolioDropReaction: If your portfolio dropped 20%, you would…

investmentGoals.title: What are you investing for?
investmentGoals.description: Tell us your primary and secondary financial goals.

esgPreferences.title: Environmental, social & governance preferences
esgPreferences.esgImportance: How important is ESG to you?
esgPreferences.acceptLowerReturnsForEsg: Would you accept lower returns for ESG-aligned investments?

financialKnowledge.title: Quick financial knowledge check
financialKnowledge.description: Five short questions — no pressure, this helps calibrate advice complexity.

q2.prompt: If inflation is 3% and your savings earn 1%, your real purchasing power…

q4.prompt: When bond prices rise, yields generally…

q5.prompt: A common emergency fund rule of thumb is…

financialPicture.title: Your overall financial picture
financialPicture.description: Share liabilities and cashflow expectations for this canvas.
financialPicture.hasMajorLongTermLiabilities: Do you have major long-term liabilities? (mortgage, student loans)
financialPicture.hasShortTermLiabilities: Do you have short-term liabilities due within 12 months?

validation.timeHorizonRequired: Please select an investment time horizon.
validation.dropReactionRequired: Please select how you would react to a portfolio drop.
validation.esgImportanceRequired: Please select how important ESG is to you.
validation.esgReturnsRequired: Please answer whether you'd accept lower returns for ESG.
validation.cashflowRequired: Please select your expected monthly cashflow.
validation.emergencyFundRequired: Please select your emergency fund coverage.
validation.dependentsInvalid: Dependents must be zero or more.

empty.noCanvas: Select a canvas to view AI insights.

insights.title: Personalized insights
insights.empty: Click Refresh insights above to generate advice tailored to this canvas.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load AI insights. Please try again.
errors.noApiKey: AI insights are not configured on the server. Contact your administrator.
errors.generationFailed: Could not generate insights. Please try again later.
errors.generationTimeout: Insight generation is taking longer than expected. Please wait a moment and refresh the page.
errors.rateLimited: Please wait a minute before refreshing again.

disclaimer: Insights are for informational purposes only and are not legal, tax, or investment advice.

chat.title: Financial assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask questions about your budget, goals, and financial data for this canvas.
chat.hint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.
chat.empty: Start a conversation. The assistant uses your canvas data and profile when answering.
chat.clearConfirmDescription: All messages for this canvas will be permanently deleted.
chat.readOnly: You need edit access on this canvas to send messages.

suggestions.budget: How am I doing against my budget this month?
suggestions.goals: What should I prioritize based on my savings goals?
suggestions.cashflow: Summarize my cash flow outlook for the next few months.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load chat history. Please try again.
errors.sendFailed: Could not send your message. Please try again.
errors.noApiKey: AI chat is not configured on the server. Contact your administrator.
errors.rateLimited: Please wait a few seconds before sending another message.
errors.invalidMessage: Your message is empty or too long.
